properties.query: select * from course where status = true;
select price from course where course_id = ?
SELECT * FROM course c JOIN instructor u ON c.instructor_id = u.instructor_id WHERE u.instructor_id = ?
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COURSE WHERE course_id = ? AND status = TRUE ) AS isCourseExists
select course_id from course where instructor_id = ?
INSERT INTO course (title, description, price, created_at, instructor_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)
INSERT INTO section (title, video_url, material_url, created_at, course_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW(), ?)
DELETE FROM course c WHERE course_id = ? AND instructor_id = ?
UPDATE COURSE SET title = ?, description = ?, price = ? WHERE course_id = ? AND instructor_id = ?
UPDATE SECTION s JOIN COURSE c ON s.course_id = c.course_id SET s.title = ?, s.video_url = ?, s.material_url = ? WHERE s.section_id = ? AND c.instructor_id = ?
SELECT * FROM SECTION WHERE course_id = ?
UPDATE SECTION s JOIN COURSE c ON s.course_id = c.course_id SET s.title = ?, s.video_url = ?, s.material_url = ? WHERE s.section_id = ? AND c.instructor_id = ?
SELECT * FROM COURSE WHERE instructor_id = ?
DELETE FROM COURSE WHERE course_id = ?
UPDATE COURSE SET title = ?, description = ?, price = ?, status = ? WHERE course_id = ?

SELECT c.course_id, c.title, e.student_id, u.user_name, e.progress_rate, e.start_date, e.end_date, e.status FROM course c JOIN ENROLLMENT e ON c.course_id = e.course_id JOIN STUDENT s ON e.student_id = s.student_id JOIN USER u ON s.user_no= u.user_no WHERE c.instructor_id = ? ORDER BY c.course_id ASC, e.start_date DESC

SELECT c.course_id, c.title, e.progress_rate FROM enrollment e JOIN course c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = ? AND e.progress_rate = 100 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review r WHERE r.course_id = c.course_id AND r.student_id = e.student_id )
INSERT INTO review (student_id, course_id, rating, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, now());

SELECT c.course_id, c.title, c.description, c.price, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(r.rating), 0), 1) as avg_rating FROM course c LEFT JOIN review r ON c.course_id = r.course_id GROUP BY c.course_id, c.title, c.description, c.price ORDER BY c.course_id ASC
